name: release-expansion-economy
description: Release matrix for effective fist power, continuous training, spin rewards, Honor, premium grants, and rebirth.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') local b=c:Invoke('Snapshot') c:Invoke('GrantPremiumFist','Celestial Titan Fist') local a=c:Invoke('Snapshot') return H:JSONEncode({ok=a.EquippedFist=='Celestial Titan Fist' and a.FistMultiplier==60 and a.EffectivePower>b.EffectivePower*50,before=b.EffectivePower,after=a.EffectivePower,mult=a.FistMultiplier})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') local b=c:Invoke('Snapshot') c:Invoke('Train','Power Bag') task.wait(2.2) local a=c:Invoke('Snapshot') c:Invoke('Train','Power Bag') return H:JSONEncode({ok=a.TrainingActive==1 and a.Power-b.Power>=8,gain=a.Power-b.Power,active=a.TrainingActive})

steps.label: one tap starts continuous power training

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') local spin=c:Invoke('Spin') c:Invoke('GrantPremiumProduct','SpinPack') local a=c:Invoke('Snapshot') return H:JSONEncode({ok=spin.ok==true and tostring(spin.reward or '')~='' and a.SpinCredits==3,reward=spin.reward,credits=a.SpinCredits})

steps.label: spin grants weighted reward and bonus credits

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('ResetWorld') c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Honor=100,Power=1000000000,FistMultiplier=60,WallLevel=100,LastHonorCycle=-1}) local buy=c:Invoke('BuyHonorItem','Crown of the Deep') local bought=c:Invoke('Snapshot') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Honor=0,LastHonorCycle=-1}) c:Invoke('BreakDepthBlock',{layer=75,column=6,row=2},3) local first=c:Invoke('Snapshot') c:Invoke('BreakDepthBlock',{layer=75,column=7,row=2},3) local second=c:Invoke('Snapshot') return H:JSONEncode({ok=buy.ok==true and bought.Honor==35 and bought.HonorPowerBonus==0.25 and first.Honor==5 and second.Honor==5,bought=bought.Honor,bonus=bought.HonorPowerBonus,first=first.Honor,second=second.Honor})

steps.label: Honor shop and one award per world cycle

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{WallLevel=55,Coins=1000000,Power=1500}) local r=c:Invoke('Rebirth') local a=c:Invoke('Snapshot') return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok==true and a.Rebirths==1 and a.Coins==0,rebirths=a.Rebirths,coins=a.Coins})
